title: RequestAccepted
description: Published by Dispatch Core when the proposed professional accepts the request (FSM transition: proposed -> accepted). This is generally followed by request.closed once the case wraps up.

pro_id.description: ID of the professional who accepted.

ttfa_seconds.description: Time-to-first-assignment: seconds elapsed between request.submitted and this acceptance. One of the key KPIs Evaluation compares across strategies.
